title: eriogonum wrightii var. curvatum
intro: Eriogonum wrightii var. curvatum, also known as Wright's buckwheat sedge, is a variety of the Wright's buckwheat sedge plant, which is a flowering plant in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The medicinal properties of Eriogonum wrightii var. curvatum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. This plant is used for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Eriogonum wrightii var. curvatum can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for its medicinal and herbal purposes.
